semanticActions.intent: Load the CLI-created run manifest for the product release candidate.
Materialize the SDK package candidate, docs, examples, marketplace page, and review package.
Run valid and blocked invoice packet usage smoke tests through the declared CLI surface.
Emit build, test, and release receipts for product-owner release review.

content.name: @bpm-ai-solutions/invoice-approval-readiness-sdk
content.description: Checks whether invoice packets have purchase order, receiving, and approval evidence before payment.

content: blockers.push(blocker('missing_invoice_core_fields', 'Invoice number, vendor, and numeric amount are required.'));
blockers.push(blocker('missing_purchase_order', 'Invoice cannot proceed because no purchase order was provided.'));
blockers.push(blocker('amount_outside_po_tolerance', 'Invoice amount is outside the purchase order tolerance.'));
nextAction: status === 'passed' ? 'Invoice packet is ready for payment approval workflow.' : 'Attach purchase order, receiving evidence, and manager approval before payment.',
Checks whether invoice packets include purchase order, receiving, and manager approval evidence before payment submission.
This package is a release-review candidate materialized by the conveyor. Archive publication is blocked until a governed package archive step exists.
Accepted for release review. Not published to a package registry.
Run the CLI against an invoice packet:
Expected status for the missing PO example: `blocked`.
- `examples/missing-po-invoice-packet.json` should block with missing purchase order and manager approval.
- `examples/missing-approval-invoice-packet.json` should block with missing manager approval.

content.tagline: Block invoice payment when purchase order, receiving, or approval evidence is missing.

content: A lightweight accounts-payable readiness checker that blocks invoice payment when required purchase order, receiving, or manager approval evidence is missing.
Private release review. Package archive publication is pending a governed archive step.
<html lang="en"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"><title>Invoice Approval Readiness SDK</title>

Private release review

Invoice Approval Readiness SDK

Block invoice payment when purchase order, receiving, or manager approval evidence is missing.

Target user

Accounts payable managers and controller teams.

Business value

Catch incomplete invoice packets before payment submission.

Checks

  • Invoice core fields
  • Purchase order evidence
  • Receiving evidence
  • Manager approval
  • PO amount tolerance

Release posture

Accepted for release review. Package archive publication is blocked until a governed archive step exists.

content.requestedOutcome: Create an invoice approval readiness checker for accounts payable managers.

content: <html lang="en"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"><title>Invoice Approval Readiness SDK - Release Review</title>

Accepted for release review

Invoice Approval Readiness SDK

Checks whether invoice packets have purchase order, receiving, and approval evidence before payment.

What was built?

SDK package candidate, CLI, API docs, quickstart, examples, tests, marketplace product page, product card, release manifest, and receipts.

Release blocker

Archive pending

A governed package archive step is still needed before a `.tgz` package can be claimed.

content.completionPosture: The conveyor produced a release-grade SDK package candidate and marketplace-ready review surfaces; archive publication remains blocked until package archive support exists.

completionPosture: The story implement CLI can produce an invoice approval release-review SDK package candidate, execute usage smoke tests, and emit marketplace/release evidence without platform-agent product assembly.
